pattern: VU-only components should not look blank in reports and should be explicit in JSON.
resolution: Add component.availability.levels and component.availability.vu_only; HTML report renders missing Lv30/Lv50 on VU-only components as ※VU生效.

pattern: Many conditions mention formation/opponent restrictions, not the buff target itself.
resolution: Distinguish target_scope from target_filters: name_contains_any, opponent_attribute, opponent_team_attribute_min_count, own_team_attribute_min_count, own_team_all_attribute, opponent_team_all_attribute, formation_size_min, exclude_self, and relative_position.

pattern: 曜日に応じた skills can have no numeric effect in the main row but still represent multiple independent effect branches.
resolution: Create weekday_variable components for Sunday through Saturday branches and VU-only daytime/nighttime components when Lv92+ rows contain 昼/夜 additions.

pattern: Some complex rows parse into components but the semantic mapping is visibly wrong.
resolution: Flag attribute branch effects and condition/effect mismatches as high-priority report suspicious items instead of force-filling uncertain values.

pattern: Duration extension values may appear as バッテリー1個につき+X分 without the 効果時間 prefix.
resolution: Parse battery-based duration delta values into duration_extension components and add trigger_conditions.event_hint=battery_use.
